| executor-hooks | seeded | seeded | Claude Code executor guardrails: PostToolUse post-edit-check.mjs (transport garbage, parse fails, phantom imports) and Stop stop-gate.sh (block exit with dirty worktree). Wired via hooks/executor-settings.json when LLM_EXECUTOR_HOOKS=1. |

| launcher | seeded | seeded | armory CLI entrypoint (bin/llm): resolve loadouts, preflight, fleet spawn, doctor, dry-run mission cards, agent-status stamp, then exec grok/claude. Absolute constraint — non-TTY launch path stays byte-compatible. |
| loadouts | seeded | seeded | Named executor loadouts under presets/*.env — grok-high (primary Grok 4.5 @ effort high), quality (native Fable), free/burn/glm/balanced lanes, shared executor-append contract, provider *.env.example credential templates. |
| tests | seeded | seeded | Bash test harness tests/run.sh plus suites for launcher (test_llm.sh), fleet (test_fleet.sh), UI phase-1 (test_ui_phase1.sh), and agent-status session fixture. npm test → bash tests/run.sh. |
